feature_tested: Analytics Engine - Craftable-class BI module with 10 analytics endpoints, dark-themed dashboard, report catalog sidebar, KPI cards, interactive charts, Menu Engineering matrix, Prime Cost analysis, Server Performance leaderboard
summary: All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Analytics BI switcher in sidebar, Analytics panel with internal report navigation, KPI cards, interactive charts (bar, line, area), data tables, Menu Engineering matrix (7 Stars, 9 Plowhorses, 7 Puzzles, 3 Dogs), and navigation between all reports. Existing Dashboard continues to work correctly.

endpoints: GET /api/analytics/home - Returns KPIs (today_revenue $5.6K, covers 152, avg_check $86, sdlw, wtd $5.6K, mtd $100.5K, labor_pct 69.8%)
GET /api/analytics/home - Returns sales_this_week chart (7 days) and sales_by_outlet table (2 outlets: main-dining $172.2K, sky-bar $23.3K)
GET /api/analytics/sales-by-hour - Returns hourly breakdown (6:00-23:00), peak_hour 18:00 ($25.2K, 615 covers)
GET /api/analytics/sales-by-item - Returns 26 items with revenue, food_cost, margin, fc_pct, avg_price
GET /api/analytics/sales-vs-labor - Returns 14-day sales vs labor comparison with labor_pct per day
GET /api/analytics/menu-engineering - Returns items classified as star/plowhorse/puzzle/dog with summary (7/9/7/3)
GET /api/analytics/prime-cost - Returns COGS (food, beverage), labor (hourly, management, benefits), prime_cost_pct, target 65%, status
GET /api/analytics/server-performance - Returns server stats (revenue, covers, tips, tip_pct, covers_per_txn)
GET /api/analytics/daily-comparison - Returns this_week vs last_week comparison with revenue_change and change_pct
GET /api/analytics/sales-trend - Returns trend data by outlet/category/item over 14 days
GET /api/analytics/reports - Returns 6 categories (sales, labor, profit, servers, comparisons, trends) with 10 total reports

verified_elements: App loads successfully without errors
Sidebar visible with Analytics BI switcher button (data-testid='analytics-mode-switcher')
Analytics BI button clickable and opens Analytics panel
Analytics panel has data-testid='analytics-engine'
Internal report navigation sidebar visible (data-testid='analytics-report-nav')
6 report categories: Overview, Sales, Labor, Profit, Servers, Comparisons, Trends
Analytics Home shows 6 KPI cards (Today Revenue, Covers, Avg Check, WTD, MTD, Labor %)
Sales This Week bar chart renders correctly
Covers This Week area chart renders correctly
Sales by Revenue Center data table shows outlets with gross, covers, avg_check
Menu Engineering Matrix shows classification cards (Star, Plowhorse, Puzzle, Dog)
Menu Engineering data table shows items with classification, qty, revenue, margin, fc%
Sales by Hour shows hourly bar chart with peak hour indicator
Report navigation between categories works correctly
Report navigation within categories works correctly
Dark theme applied consistently across all reports
Charts use recharts library (BarChart, LineChart, AreaChart, PieChart)
Data tables have proper styling with hover effects
KPI cards show change percentages with color coding (green/red)
Loading states show pulse animation
Existing LUCCCA Dashboard still loads correctly
Dashboard shows Revenue $279,009.47, Labor 83.5%, Inventory $2,606
Dashboard shows Top-Selling Items and Labor Breakdown
Panel system works correctly (open/close Analytics panel)
Sidebar z-index remains above panels

critical_code_review_comments: Analytics Engine backend correctly aggregates data from pos_transactions, gl_entries, and labor_schedules collections
Menu Engineering classification algorithm correctly implements Stars/Plowhorses/Puzzles/Dogs based on popularity and margin thresholds
Prime Cost analysis correctly calculates COGS (food + beverage) and Labor (hourly + management + benefits) as percentage of revenue
Frontend uses recharts library for all interactive charts with consistent dark theme styling
Panel registration correctly added to panel-registry.ts, panel-types.ts, and panel-metadata.ts
Sidebar AnalyticsModeSwitcher component correctly opens analytics-engine panel
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Report navigation uses internal state management without URL routing
seed_data_creation: Analytics data comes from POS simulation (2713 transactions, 30 days of simulated data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 67 Analytics Engine features working correctly. 10 backend endpoints tested and passing. Frontend Analytics BI panel accessible via sidebar switcher button. All reports (Home, Sales by Hour, Sales by Item, Sales vs Labor, Menu Engineering, Prime Cost, Server Performance, Daily Comparison, Sales Trends) render correctly with charts and data tables. Previous iterations 59-66 all passed 100%.
